result.summary: Zillow exposes several HTTP APIs: Bridge-hosted Public Records, Zestimate, and Agent Reviews APIs requiring Bridge credentials, a Mortgage Get Current Rates API requiring `partnerId`, plus public Neighborhood/Real Estate Metrics downloads and an Rentals Lead API with auth undetermined.

bridge_api_key.label: Bridge API access token
bridge_api_key.setup: Create a [Bridge Interactive Platform](https://bridgedataoutput.com/register) account, then in the dashboard go to `Data Access > API Access Tokens` to find or create your token. Zillow’s Bridge-hosted APIs use this token as the API key credential.

bridge_password.label: Bridge platform password
bridge_password.setup: Register at [Bridge Interactive Platform](https://bridgedataoutput.com/register) and use the password you set for your Bridge account. Zillow’s Bridge-hosted APIs mention password + access token authentication.

bridge_partner_id.label: Mortgage partnerId
bridge_partner_id.setup: Request access to the mortgage API from the [Get Current Rates](https://www.zillowgroup.com/developers/api/mortgage/get-current-rates/) page. The docs say `partnerId` is required, but do not describe a separate minting flow; treat it as an issued partner identifier from Zillow support.

surfaces.name: Zillow Mortgage Get Current Rates API
